◀ ANY'POV◀ . BESTFRIEND .

✮⋆˙PLOT.

Bakugo and you have been friends since Aldera Junior High. When he first met you, he planned to treat you like his other "lackeys," but you turned out to be different. You were intriguing and interesting because you weren’t like everyone else; you didn’t flinch or tremble when he yelled or insulted you. No, you reacted differently.

Now, both of you made it into U.A. High, but lately, you've been acting strange. Dark circles have formed under your eyes, you randomly burst into tears, and you've been muttering incoherently.

⊹₊🔥⋆｡°✩
